task_description: A cascading outage affected all services starting at 08:02 UTC. The 'recommendation' service crashed repeatedly, propagating failures through the dependency chain.

commits.author: dave@company.com
commits.message: security: migrate to new session manager library
commits.diff:
--- a/recommendation-service/session_manager.go
+++ b/recommendation-service/session_manager.go
-// Old: stable configuration
-config.MaxSize = 100
-config.Timeout = 30 * time.Second
+// New: reduced limits for 'optimization'
+config.MaxSize = 17
+config.Timeout = 4 * time.Second
+// WARNING: This may cause issues under high load
